RedoxRRI 0.99.0
  • Get started
  • Reference

Simulate a Holobiont Redox Dataset with Spatio-Temporal Structure

Source: R/simulate_redox_holobiont.R
simulate_redox_holobiont.Rd

Generates a synthetic plant–soil–microbe dataset with structured redox dynamics, disturbance forcing, partial cross-domain decoupling, configurable sparsity (zero inflation), and missing-not-at-random (MNAR) Eh dropout. The simulator is intended for benchmarking, methodological validation, and demonstration of RedoxRRI workflows.

simulate_redox_holobiont(
  n_plot = 4,
  n_depth = 2,
  n_plant = 5,
  n_time = 15,
  p_micro = 60,
  seed = 123,
  include_graph = FALSE,
  disturbance_strength = 0.4,
  disturbance_center = NULL,
  disturbance_width = 0.1,
  seasonal_amp = 0.08,
  seasonal_phase = 0,
  stochastic_reassembly = TRUE,
  decoupling = 0.3,
  zero_inflation = 0.4,
  MNAR_strength = 0.4,
  Eh_dropout_threshold = 0.25
)

Arguments

n_plot

Integer greater than or equal to 1. Number of plots.

n_depth

Integer (1 or 2). Number of soil depths.

n_plant

Integer greater than or equal to 1. Number of plants per plot–depth.

n_time

Integer greater than or equal to 2. Number of time points per plant.

p_micro

Integer greater than or equal to 1. Number of microbial features.

seed

Optional integer seed. Use NULL for stochastic runs.

include_graph

Logical. If TRUE and igraph is available, returns a simulated system-level network.

disturbance_strength

Numeric between 0 and 1. Magnitude of the mid-season disturbance pulse.

disturbance_center

Optional numeric. If NULL, the disturbance is centred at the median time point.

disturbance_width

Numeric greater than 0. Controls pulse width as a fraction of the total season length.

seasonal_amp

Numeric greater than or equal to 0. Amplitude of seasonal forcing.

seasonal_phase

Numeric. Phase shift for the seasonal sine wave (radians).

stochastic_reassembly

Logical. If TRUE, microbial communities combine deterministic structure with a stochastic reassembly component.

decoupling

Numeric between 0 and 1 indicating cross-domain decoupling (0 = tightly coupled, 1 = fully decoupled).

zero_inflation

Numeric between 0 and 1 giving the probability that a microbial entry is set to zero.

MNAR_strength

Numeric between 0 and 1 controlling the strength of missing-not-at-random Eh dropout under strongly reduced states.

Eh_dropout_threshold

Numeric between 0 and 1 specifying the latent redox threshold below which Eh dropout may occur.

Value

A named list containing:

  • id: Experimental design structure.

  • ROS_flux: Simulated plant physiological indicators.

  • Eh_stability: Soil redox chemistry variables.

  • micro_data: Microbial feature matrix.

  • latent_truth: Simulated underlying redox state scaled between 0 and 1.

  • graph: Optional igraph object if requested.

Contents

Developed by Mitra Ghotbi.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
